title: Happy 1st Birthday Blue Prism Banner (3.6 Meter Long) 1 Piece - Perfect for First Birthday Party Decorations
features: CELEBRATE IN STYLE: Make your little one's first birthday party extra special with our eye-catching happy 1st birthday blue prism banner; perfectly crafted to add that magical touch to the big day.

BLUE PRISM DESIGN: The unique blue prism pattern on the banner will effortlessly enhance your party décor, while the bold "Happy 1st Birthday" message proudly showcases your baby's milestone celebration.
IMPRESSIVE SIZE: Our impressive 3.6-meter-long blue prism banner will make a statement at your event, allowing you to create an unforgettable backdrop for those precious birthday photos.
ONE-AND-DONE CONVENIENCE: Conveniently packaged as a single, durable piece, this happy 1st birthday blue prism banner arrives ready for immediate use and hassle-free setup.

PERFECT FOR 1ST BIRTHDAY PARTIES: Trust our happy 1st birthday prism banner to effortlessly elevate your little one's special day with its charming design and delightful colors – making it the ultimate birthday decoration for creating lasting memories.
description: Product Description Make your party look more adorable with our Prismatic Foil "Happy 1st Birthday" Banner. 1 Birthday Banner - 12 ft.This blue prismatic banner features a "Happy 1st Birthday" headline with fun and bright design. This disposable prismatic banner is perfect for celebrating fun birthday parties. Made of durable foil material, this prismatic banner is very eye catching with high quality prints. This product is easy to assemble, install, and can be stored and re-used. Box Contains 1 x Banner
